sourceMovie.title: Classified
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Classified (2024) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: John Wick
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Classified clicked for you, John Wick (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Classified?
faq.answer: Try John Wick, The Gray Man, Desperado—each shares DNA with Classified while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Classified?
faq.answer: Classified (2024) is best described as Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Classified worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
